name: Sebadas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together ricotta, lemon zest, egg, yogurt and sugar until well blended.
2. In another mixing bowl, place flour and semolina in a well. In a small saucepan, stir together milk and butter until butter is melted. Pour into well of flour and incorporate wet into dry to form a dough. Knead dough for one minute, form a ball, wrap and refrigerate for one hour.
3. Heat oil to 375 degrees F in a 12 to 14-inch frying pan.
4. Roll out pastry to 1/4-inch thick using a pasta roller.
5. Cut 20 3 1/2-inch rounds out of the pastry.
6. Place 2 tablespoons cheese mixture on 10 rounds and cover each like a sandwich.
7. Press edges together to seal and place in oil until golden brown, about one minute.
8. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve with warm honey.
Yield: 4 servings
